# CGImageMetadataType

**Enumeration**

Constants that indicate the XMP type for a metadata tag.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CGImageMetadataType
```

## Overview

Use these constants to identify the type of metadata in a [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/CGImageMetadataTag] opaque type. The type tells you how to interpret the value of the metadata tag. When creating a new [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/CGImageMetadataTag], specify a type so the system knows how to serialize the data to the XMP format.

## Metadata Types

- **CGImageMetadataType.invalid**: An invalid metadata type.
- **CGImageMetadataType.default**: The default type for new tags.
- **CGImageMetadataType.string**: A string value.
- **CGImageMetadataType.arrayUnordered**: An array that doesn’t preserve the order of items.
- **CGImageMetadataType.arrayOrdered**: An array that preserves the order of items.
- **CGImageMetadataType.alternateArray**: An ordered array, in which all elements are alternates for the same value.
- **CGImageMetadataType.alternateText**: An alternate array, in which all elements are localized strings for the same value.
- **CGImageMetadataType.structure**: A collection of keys and values.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Getting the Tag Type

- **CGImageMetadataTagGetType(_:)**: Returns the type of the metadata tag’s value.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
